ideas.title: Dashpivot system SRAPC has for forms and photographic evidence.
Modern, Scalable Forms Platform to Unlock Company-Wide Automation
AI assisted (Copilot) Contract Handbook from Day One? Yes Please!
Elevating our Teams with Cobots - Human Skill Meets Robotic Support
Cross-Sell like a pro with a Contract Database
From Drones to Decisions - Elevating Our Asset Intelligence Capability
Cut admin, bulk upload to Solv
Unified Work Permit and Training Management System
Appropriate Training and Close Supervision to Contractors
Welcome To Your Ventia Journey Pack
Streamlining HSE Evaluation for Subcontractor Onboarding
VenPack (eg work pack) - Automated work specification and verification
Uploading artefacts more efficiently to save time and space
QA photos direct to SharePoint folder
Predict the Shift. Protect Your Assets and People
Invoice Processing and Approval in ARIBA
Parking at Cremorne to support working from office
Build a live ABN check into AP_AR system
Introduce geotracking of the tradesperson against the location of work
Improve Client Reporting ON Boot Fittings

scoring_rubric: 2 points per like, 3 points per comment and 1 point per token vote.
Stage/status weight favours ideas already in Evaluate, Develop or Implement.
Low-effort ideas get a quick-win uplift.
Data/reporting ideas get a small uplift because the requested demo is data-related.
Closed, duplicate or high-effort ideas are penalised.
The score is a triage heuristic, not a formal business case.
data_quality_notes: The current table has 542 rows, not the earlier 523 figure, based on the latest Databricks count.
The output excludes submitter and owner fields to avoid exposing personal data in the demo.
customFields and keyPhrases are not used for scoring because prior inspection showed sparse or weak evidence.
Feasibility is inferred from title and description keywords. It needs owner validation before delivery funding.
